_comment: Opus-authored, keyless world envelope for the object/verb schema (SPEC 2026-06-30). Load with `bin/game world load worlds/bunny.json`. No LLM call, no API key. Toons carry per-NPC `talk` dialogue bindings; items are `things` (some readable, with aliases). Rook's dialogue explicitly spawns the canonical 'sheaf of papers' on request.

world.name: bunny world
world.aesthetic_seed: cozy soft painterly Spiritfarer-warm twilight, watercolor edges, a small dream that remembers being visited

rooms.title: A Quiet Meadow
rooms.seed: a small grassy meadow at dusk, fireflies just beginning to drift between tall grasses, the air cool and smelling of earth, soft watercolor edges

rooms.title: The Quiet Forge
rooms.seed: a snug forge with banked embers drifting like sleepy fireflies, tools in neat warm rows, a kettle at the back of the hearth, painterly and soft

rooms.title: A Wooden Bridge
rooms.seed: a wooden bridge arching over a slow stream, dragonflies in warm afternoon light, boards that creak in a friendly way, painterly

rooms.title: A Dusty Attic
rooms.seed: an attic of old paper and cedar, a round window throwing a warm spotlight across stacks of forgotten trunks, dust turning slow in slanting light

rooms.title: The Birch Hollow
rooms.seed: a small clearing among birches, moss softening every stone, a hush at the edge of dusk, a breeze moving through without disturbing it

toons.name: Wren
toons.seed: a quiet wandering toon who hums when alone
toons.appearance_seed: a soft watercolor toon in a dusty cloak, freckles, kind eyes

toons.name: Rook
toons.seed: the forge-keeper; slow-moving and quiet; hums old songs at the bellows, sleeves always a little sooty; keeps careful sketches of every small repair
toons.appearance_seed: a stocky person in a soot-smudged apron, kind eyes behind round spectacles, sleeves rolled past the elbows, hair wound in a wool kerchief
toons.presence_text: Rook is at the bellows, sleeves a little sooty, humming something slow under their breath.

toons.name: Iris
toons.seed: the attic archivist; older, soft-voiced, curious; sorts old letters and small objects with patient attention; sometimes reads a passage aloud to no one in particular
toons.appearance_seed: an older person with reading glasses on a beaded cord, ink-stained fingertips, a soft cardigan with patched elbows, hair gone silver at the temples
toons.presence_text: Iris glances up from a sheaf of old letters, marks her place with a strip of ribbon, and offers a small nod before returning to her sorting.

dialogue.description: Talk to Iris, the attic archivist.

toons.name: Bram
toons.seed: a wandering tender of small green things who drifts between the bridge and the hollow, pockets full of seeds and pressed leaves
toons.appearance_seed: a lanky young person in a moss-green coat, dirt under the nails, a sprig tucked behind one ear, an easy unhurried smile
toons.presence_text: Bram looks up from a patch of moss, brushes soil from their knees, and gives a slow friendly wave.

items.name: brass lantern
items.seed: an old brass lantern with a hairline crack and a steady warm flame

items.name: tin kettle
items.seed: a dented tin kettle, warm from the back of the hearth, smelling faintly of chamomile

items.name: bundle of letters
items.seed: a soft bundle of old letters tied with a strip of pale ribbon, the ink gone brown at the edges

items.name: river stone
items.seed: a palm-sized river stone, cool and grey-green, worn perfectly smooth

skills.name: tend
skills.description: Tend the moss and small green things in the hollow.
skills.prompt_template:
A visitor tends the moss and small green things of the birch hollow. Their gesture: {{ player_input }}
Reply with ONE soft, painterly `narrate` effect (cozy, Spiritfarer-warm, unhurried, no modern tech). Return JSON with an 'effects' list.

skills.name: stoke
skills.description: Stoke the banked embers of the forge.
skills.prompt_template:
A visitor stokes the banked embers of the quiet forge. Their gesture: {{ player_input }}
Reply with ONE soft, painterly `narrate` effect (cozy, Spiritfarer-warm, embers drifting like fireflies, no urgency). Return JSON with an 'effects' list.
